description: Configure Chrome for a color-accurate web design workflow based on the agency standard at ~/Desktop/design_workspace_standard.txt. Enable the flags 'enable-experimental-web-platform-features' and 'enable-gpu-rasterization', and disable 'smooth-scrolling' and 'enable-quic'. Download brand_color_palette.json, icon_sprite_sheet.svg, and typography_guide.pdf from http://localhost:8080 to ~/projects/design-assets/. Configure custom search engine shortcuts with keywords 'dribbble', 'gfonts', and 'icons'. Organize all bookmarks on the bookmark bar into two folders named 'Design Tools' and 'Inspiration' so that no bookmarks remain loose. Set the homepage to https://www.figma.com, set startup to restore the previous session, set the default download directory to ~/projects/design-assets/ with the 'always ask' setting enabled, and disable password saving.
